description: A ground-level photograph, credited to M. Palacios, depicting sparsely vegetated areas in the South of Spain. The foreground consists of rocky, earthy terrain with low-lying, reddish-brown sparse vegetation and scattered patches of snow. On the left side of the foreground, a tall wooden pole with a cross-shaped trail marker is visible. In the mid-ground, a prominent conical mountain rises, also showing patches of snow on its slopes. The background features a distant horizon under a clear sky, with light orange and pink hues typical of sunrise or sunset, and a dark blue area that could be a distant body of water or forest.
